shared_types.LedgerFieldRule: struct(pattern: str, label: ClassificationLabel, description: str)
shared_types.CircuitConfig: struct(stages: list[ReviewStage], parallel_stages: list[list[ReviewStage]], stage_timeout_ms: int, block_threshold: int, warn_threshold: int)
shared_types.ReviewReport: struct(id: str, review_request_id: str, decision: ReviewDecision, findings: list[Finding], assessments: list[Assessment], confidence: Confidence, trust_scores: list[TrustScore], conflict_notes: list[str], summary: str, seal: Optional[TesseraSeal], created_at: str, metadata: dict[str, str])
shared_types.Finding: struct(id: str, hunk_id: str, file_path: str, line_number: Optional[int], severity: Severity, confidence: Confidence, title: str, description: str, suggestion: Optional[str], rule_id: str, stage: ReviewStage)
shared_types.Assessment: struct(id: str, review_request_id: str, stage: ReviewStage, reviewer_id: str, decision: ReviewDecision, findings: list[Finding], confidence: Confidence, is_partial: bool, error_message: Optional[str], duration_ms: int, created_at: str)
shared_types.TrustScore: struct(reviewer_id: str, stage: ReviewStage, weight: float, accepted_count: int, dismissed_count: int, updated_at: str)
shared_types.TesseraSeal: struct(content_hash: str, previous_hash: Optional[str], chain_hash: str, sealed_at: str, sealer_id: str)
shared_types.DiffHunk: struct(id: str, file_path: str, start_line_old: int, count_old: int, start_line_new: int, count_new: int, context_before: list[str], added_lines: list[str], removed_lines: list[str], context_after: list[str], raw_header: str, classifications: list[ClassificationLabel], language: Optional[str])
shared_types.PolicyToken: struct(token_id: str, reviewer_id: str, allowed_file_patterns: list[str], denied_file_patterns: list[str], allowed_classifications: list[ClassificationLabel], max_severity: Severity, issued_at: str, expires_at: Optional[str])
shared_types.ChroniclerEventType: enum(review.started, stage.started, stage.complete, assessment.merged, report.sealed, review.complete, policy.violation, pattern.detected, learning.recorded)
shared_types.ChroniclerEvent: struct(event_id: str, event_type: ChroniclerEventType, review_request_id: str, timestamp: str, stage: Optional[ReviewStage], reviewer_id: Optional[str], payload: dict[str, str], message: str)
shared_types.ReviewRequest: struct(id: str, source: str, hunks: list[DiffHunk], file_paths: list[str], created_at: str, metadata: dict[str, str])
shared_types.ReviewerCredential: struct(reviewer_id: str, display_name: str, stage: ReviewStage, public_key_hex: str, created_at: str, is_active: bool)
shared_types.StigmergySignal: struct(signal_id: str, pattern_key: str, description: str, occurrences: int, first_seen_at: str, last_seen_at: str, reviewer_id: Optional[str], stage: Optional[ReviewStage], metadata: dict[str, str])
shared_types.LearningRecord: struct(record_id: str, finding_id: str, reviewer_id: str, stage: ReviewStage, rule_id: str, severity: Severity, accepted: bool, human_comment: Optional[str], recorded_at: str)
shared_types.KindexEntry: struct(key: str, kind: str, summary: str, data: dict[str, str], tags: list[str], created_at: str, updated_at: str)

conventions: Pydantic v2 with frozen=True for all data models
One test file per module in tests/
No mocking of core logic — mock only external I/O
No GPU, API keys, or network required
Package namespace: exemplar (all imports: from exemplar.X import Y)
Each integration must be a real, functional integration point
Fire-and-forget for optional integrations (unreachable services don't block)
PACT keys embedded in all public methods for Sentinel attribution
Chronicler events at every stage boundary
